sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77171" key="panagaqi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-ᾰγᾰθία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77171.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">perfect goodness</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theag.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1.117</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
